category_sources: source_facts.description says autoformat shell script source code; official mvdan/sh repository describes a shell parser, formatter, and interpreter including shfmt.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shfmt; official mvdan/sh repository includes the shfmt command.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the main documentation surface; Go package documentation is generated from the official module source for the shfmt command.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/mvdan/sh, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official mvdan/sh repository identify shfmt as the shell source formatter with bash and POSIX shell support.
